executives.name: Douglas Forster
executives.background: Mr. Forster has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He was the President and CEO of Newmarket Gold and has served on several public company boards.

tenure_dates.title: Founder, President, Chief Executive Officer & Director

executives.name: Edward Farrauto
executives.background: Mr. Farrauto has over 30 years of experience as a senior financial executive in the mining industry, including roles as CFO for several public companies.

board_of_directors.name: Raymond Threlkeld
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Threlkeld has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the President and CEO of Rainy River Resources and held senior roles at Barrick Gold.
